primary.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

canvas.$description: Page / screen base (the lowest level). Raised cards sit on it as `surface` (white). In dark this is the darkest base; elevation goes lighter.

secondary.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

tertiary.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

paper.$description: Warm paper base for the funnel header gradient band (behind the content card). Use as the RadialGlow base.

inverse.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

inverse-hover.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

brand-default.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

brand-hover.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

brand-subtle.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

brand-on-solid.$description: Intentionally non-adaptive. Background on brand-solid always dark regardless of theme.

warning-default.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

warning-hover.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

warning-solid.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

warning-solid-hover.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

error-default.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

error-hover.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

error-solid.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

error-solid-hover.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

info-default.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

info-hover.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

info-solid.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

info-solid-hover.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

info-on-solid.$description: Text/icon on info solid background (yellow). White in light mode.

success-default.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

success-hover.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

success-solid.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

disabled.$description: Disabled element background. Intentionally same as secondary to look muted.

surface.$description: Elevated surface (cards, panels). Same as primary in light. Distinct in dark.

surface-raised.$description: Higher elevation (modals, dropdowns). Distinct from surface in dark mode.

overlay-light.$description: Subtle scrim overlay (#fafafa light). Use for gentle focus traps.

overlay-default.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

overlay-heavy.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

options.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

options-hover.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

rating.$description: Rating tag / badge background. Yellow accent. Light: yellow/500, Dark: yellow/600.

error.$description: Error state background. Light: very light red (50), Dark: vivid red (400).

success.$description: Success state background. Light: very light green (50), Dark: vivid green (300).

secondary-action.$description: Secondary action (e.g. Secondary button) solid background — default state. Distinct from info-solid to avoid semantic coupling.

secondary-action-hover.$description: Secondary action solid background — hover state.

secondary-action-active.$description: Secondary action solid background — active/pressed state.

selected.$description: Selected-state background tint (e.g. selected cards / list rows).

subtle.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

subtle-hover.$description: Surface and container backgrounds. Use semantic tokens, not primitives directly.

health.$description: Health promo card background (light green). Aliases → decorative/promo-green.

vaccine.$description: Vaccine/wellness promo card background (light blue). Aliases → decorative/promo-blue.

beauty.$description: Beauty promo card background (light pink). Aliases → decorative/promo-pink.

service.$description: Service promo card background (light cream). Aliases → decorative/promo-cream.

tile.$description: Service tile card background (very light teal). Aliases → decorative/promo-teal.

primary.$description: Text and label colors. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

primary-hover.$description: Text and label colors. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

inverse.$description: Text and label colors. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

secondary.$description: Text and label colors. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

secondary-hover.$description: Text and label colors. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

tertiary.$description: Text and label colors. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

disabled.$description: Text and label colors. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

placeholder.$description: Text and label colors. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

brand.$description: Brand-blue text — the full brand blue (blue/500 #00C3FF). Product ruling 2026-06: brand text uses the full brand blue, matching fills/icons. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

brand-hover.$description: Text and label colors. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

on-brand.$description: Text/icon on brand-blue surfaces. White in both modes — product ruling 2026-06: blue CTAs always use white text. (Previously dark — see DS changelog.)

warning.$description: Text and label colors. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

warning-inverse.$description: Text and label colors. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

on-warning.$description: Intentionally non-adaptive. Text on warning always dark for contrast.

error-hover.$description: Text and label colors. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

error-inverse.$description: Text and label colors. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

info-hover.$description: Text and label colors. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

info-on-solid.$description: Text and label colors. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

info-inverse.$description: Text and label colors. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

success.$description: Text and label colors. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

success-inverse.$description: Text and label colors. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

on-success.$description: Text and label colors. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

promo.$description: Text and label colors. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

on-promo.$description: Intentionally non-adaptive. Text on promo always white for contrast.

link.$description: Text and label colors. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

link-hover.$description: Text and label colors. Always prefer text/* over hardcoded values.

link-brand.$description: Brand blue link text — full brand blue (blue/500 light, blue/400 dark)

error.$description: Base error text color. Replaces text/notification-danger.

info.$description: Base informational text color — helper text, captions, status messages.

on-options.$description: Intentionally non-adaptive. Text on purple options bg always white.

promo-dark.$description: Dark teal text for promo cards. Aliases → decorative/promo-dark-teal.

promo-accent.$description: Campaign accent pink text. Aliases → decorative/campaign-pink.

on-error.$description: Text color on error-solid backgrounds (destructive buttons, error banners).

on-secondary-action.$description: Text on secondary-action (yellow) solid backgrounds — WHITE in both modes per product ruling 2026-06 (matches brand CTA treatment). Note: contrast on yellow/500 is below AA; ruling accepted by design.

on-tertiary.$description: Text on tertiary-action (solid teal) backgrounds — WHITE in both modes per product ruling 2026-06 (all colored CTAs use white text).

primary.$description: Icon fill and stroke colors. Use icon/* tokens for all iconography.

primary-hover.$description: Icon fill and stroke colors. Use icon/* tokens for all iconography.

secondary.$description: Icon fill and stroke colors. Use icon/* tokens for all iconography.

secondary-hover.$description: Icon fill and stroke colors. Use icon/* tokens for all iconography.

muted.$description: Icon fill and stroke colors. Use icon/* tokens for all iconography.

disabled.$description: Icon fill and stroke colors. Use icon/* tokens for all iconography.

inverse.$description: Icon fill and stroke colors. Use icon/* tokens for all iconography.

brand.$description: Icon fill and stroke colors. Use icon/* tokens for all iconography.

warning.$description: Icon fill and stroke colors. Use icon/* tokens for all iconography.

warning-inverse.$description: Intentionally non-adaptive. Icon on warning-inverse always dark.

error.$description: Icon fill and stroke colors. Use icon/* tokens for all iconography.

success.$description: Icon fill and stroke colors. Use icon/* tokens for all iconography.

success-inverse.$description: Icon fill and stroke colors. Use icon/* tokens for all iconography.

info.$description: Icon fill and stroke colors. Use icon/* tokens for all iconography.

promo.$description: Icon fill and stroke colors. Use icon/* tokens for all iconography.

on-solid.$description: Intentionally non-adaptive. Icon on solid brand bg always white.

on-solid-warning.$description: Intentionally non-adaptive. Icon on solid warning always dark.

link.$description: Icon fill and stroke colors. Use icon/* tokens for all iconography.

default.$description: Stroke and divider colors. Use border/* tokens for all borders and separators.

strong.$description: Stroke and divider colors. Use border/* tokens for all borders and separators.

inverse.$description: Stroke and divider colors. Use border/* tokens for all borders and separators.

brand-default.$description: Stroke and divider colors. Use border/* tokens for all borders and separators.

brand-inverse.$description: Intentionally non-adaptive. Brand inverse border always dark.

error-default.$description: Stroke and divider colors. Use border/* tokens for all borders and separators.

error-solid.$description: Stroke and divider colors. Use border/* tokens for all borders and separators.

focus.$description: Stroke and divider colors. Use border/* tokens for all borders and separators.

disabled.$description: Stroke and divider colors. Use border/* tokens for all borders and separators.

info-default.$description: Stroke and divider colors. Use border/* tokens for all borders and separators.

success-default.$description: Stroke and divider colors. Use border/* tokens for all borders and separators.

warning-default.$description: Stroke and divider colors. Use border/* tokens for all borders and separators.

subtle.$description: Stroke and divider colors. Use border/* tokens for all borders and separators.

ring-primary.$description: Focus ring (semantic layer). Aliases primitive color/ring/focus-primary. Dark currently mirrors Light — pending design decision.

ring-secondary.$description: Focus ring (semantic layer). Aliases primitive color/ring/focus-secondary. Dark currently mirrors Light — pending design decision.

ring-tertiary.$description: Focus ring (semantic layer). Aliases primitive color/ring/focus-tertiary. Dark currently mirrors Light — pending design decision.

ring-danger.$description: Focus ring (semantic layer). Aliases primitive color/ring/focus-danger. Dark currently mirrors Light — pending design decision.

ring-pill.$description: Focus ring (semantic layer). Aliases primitive color/ring/focus-pill. Dark currently mirrors Light — pending design decision.

promo-inverse.$description: Inverse border for promo (teal) surfaces. Light+Dark adaptive — white on light for contrast.

shadow-xs.$description: Shadows, overlays, and blur tokens. Light+Dark adaptive.

shadow-sm.$description: Shadows, overlays, and blur tokens. Light+Dark adaptive.

shadow-md.$description: Shadows, overlays, and blur tokens. Light+Dark adaptive.

shadow-lg.$description: Shadows, overlays, and blur tokens. Light+Dark adaptive.

shadow-xl.$description: Shadows, overlays, and blur tokens. Light+Dark adaptive.

shadow-2xl.$description: Shadows, overlays, and blur tokens. Light+Dark adaptive.

overlay-default.$description: Shadows, overlays, and blur tokens. Light+Dark adaptive.

overlay-heavy.$description: Intentionally non-adaptive. Heavy overlay always dark neutral/900.

overlay-light.$description: Shadows, overlays, and blur tokens. Light+Dark adaptive.

tint.$description: Liquid-glass surface tint laid over the blurred backdrop (light). Capped low (<=0.18) so it never paints OVER the blur and washes to solid white — the blur/refraction must read through.

tint-strong.$description: Denser glass tint for busy backdrops (light). Still capped at 0.18 to stay translucent.

border.$description: Hairline edge highlight around a glass surface (light).

highlight.$description: Top specular sheen line on a glass surface (light).

blur.$description: Glass backdrop blur radius (web backdrop-filter, px).

intensity.$description: Glass blur intensity for the native expo-blur fallback (0-100). ~55 with a system-material tint reads as frost; 70+ with a light tint washes to white.

primary.$description: Rating badge background — yellow. Points to Primitive: color/yellow/500. Upgrade to Semantic in v0.4.

brand.$description: Badge background — brand blue. → Semantic: background/brand-default.

danger.$description: Danger badge background — red. Points to Primitive: color/red/400. Upgrade to Semantic in v0.4.

success.$description: Success badge background — green. Points to Primitive: color/green/300. Upgrade to Semantic in v0.4.

info.$description: Badge background — info. Upgrade to semantic in v0.4.
Badge text — info. Upgrade to semantic in v0.4.

bg-active.$description: Secondary active (pressed) bg — a darker gold (was brown #B86819, which only suited white text).

text.$description: Secondary btn label — dark amber on the yellow bg (was white #FFFFFF: only ~1.5:1, failed contrast). ~5:1 here.
